tools.description: Returns firmware update availability for the NVR and all adopted devices (cameras, lights, sensors, viewers, chimes, bridges, doorlocks). Use to check whether any device needs a firmware update.
tools.name: protect_get_firmware_status

tools.description: Returns NVR health summary including CPU load and temperature, memory usage, and storage utilization. Use to diagnose performance issues or storage pressure.
tools.name: protect_get_health

tools.description: Returns NVR model, firmware version, uptime, storage usage, and connected device counts. Use for basic 'is the NVR healthy?' checks and capacity overview.
tools.name: protect_get_system_info

tools.description: Lists all connected Protect viewers (e.g., UP-Viewer, Viewport) with their connection state, firmware version, and assigned liveview.
tools.name: protect_list_viewers
